case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA VS. JAMES EAGLETON ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $405.74 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLETON, JAMES EAGLETON, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLETON, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AND PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-14-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VIVIAN HO, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT WILLIAM EAGLETON. PARTIES NEGOTIATED A SETTLEMENT AND AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLETON, WILLIAM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLETON, WILLIAM
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-18-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLETON, JAMES EAGLETON, WILLIAM CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-14-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EAGLETON, JAMES
